old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.5","title":"Add T1000-E Renode model","description":"Compose a faithful-enough T1000-E model from nRF52840, LR1110, board GPIO/SPIM wiring, deterministic AG3335 UART behavior, USB CDC/SMP endpoints, and stable FICR identity.","acceptance_criteria":"Canonical T1000-E gateway and puck firmware reach late app oracles and simulator-observed LR1110 TX; model boundaries explicitly exclude UF2 layout, GNSS RF, USB electrical behavior, and real LoRa RF proof.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:40:35.850691Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T19:40:35.850691Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:40:35.981335Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.5","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-oqv7.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:44:13.767096Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
